allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=json.loads\(data[0]['text']\)['result']; tables={}; [tables.setdefault\(r['table_name'],[]\).append\(r\) for r in rows]; [print\(f\\"\\n=== {t} ===\\"\) or [print\(f\\"  {c['ordinal_position']:2}. {c['column_name']:40} {c['data_type']:30} nullable={c['is_nullable']} default={c['column_default']}\\"\) for c in cols] for t,cols in sorted\(tables.items\(\)\)]")
Bash(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force graphify-out, tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo, .vite-react-ssg-temp, scratch, prerender-debug.log, stats.html -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
